en: A portable television studio. No wonder your president has to be an actor.
He's got to look good on television. Whoa, this is it. This is the part coming up, Doc.
No, no, no, no. This sucker's electrical. But I need a nuclear reaction to...
to generate the 1.21 gigawatts of electricity... What did I just say?
The flux capacity stores... This sucker's electrical.
But I need a nuclear reaction to... to generate the 1.21 gigawatts of electricity...
What the hell is a gigawatt? How could I have been so careless?
ko: 내가 어떻게 이렇게 부주의할 수 있었지?

en: 1.21 gigawatts! Tom, how am I going to generate that kind of power?
It can't be done. Can it? Doc, look.
All we need is a little plutonium. Oh, I'm sure that in 1985...
ko: 1985년에는 플루토늄이 모든 구석의 약국에서 구할 수 있었겠지만...

en: plutonium was available in every corner drugstore.
ko: 1985년에는 플루토늄이 모든 구석의 약국에서 구할 수 있었겠지만...

en: But in 1955, it's a little hard to come by.
Marty, I'm sorry, but I'm afraid you're stuck here.
ko: 마티, 미안하지만 너는 여기 갇힌 것 같아.
